display.purpose: Hero headings only. Left-aligned, three words max per line.

headline.purpose: Section titles, product names on detail pages.

label.purpose: Badges, kicker text, filter tabs. Uppercase, tracked.

mono.purpose: All prices, SKUs, order IDs. Formatted as Rp 125.000.

shadows.name: press
shadows.purpose: Hover state on .btn-chunky and .card-hover. The only shadow in this system.

shadows.name: none
shadows.purpose: All surfaces at rest. The 2px border does the work.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: All state transitions. 120ms for buttons, 150ms for cards.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action button. Blueprint Blue. Press shadow on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: #2563eb; color: #fafaf9; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 800; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 8px; border: 2px solid #111111; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1d4ed8; transform: translate(-2px, -2px); box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 #111111; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563eb; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translate(0,0); box-shadow: none; }

components.name: Accent Button (Cart)
components.description: Cart button and primary CTAs. Filament Yellow. Press shadow on hover.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-accent"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="9" cy="21" r="1"/><circle cx="20" cy="21" r="1"/><path d="M1 1h4l2.68 13.39a2 2 0 0 0 2 1.61h9.72a2 2 0 0 0 2-1.61L23 6H6"/></svg> Keranjang</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-accent { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; background: #facc15; color: #0f0f0e; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 800; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 8px; border: 2px solid #111111; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-accent:hover { background: #eab308; transform: translate(-2px, -2px); box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 #111111; } .ds-btn-accent:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563eb; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-accent:active { transform: translate(0,0); box-shadow: none; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary action. White with 2px border. Press shadow on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: #fafaf9; color: #0f0f0e; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 800; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 8px; border: 2px solid #111111; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #eff6ff; transform: translate(-2px, -2px); box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 #111111; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2563eb; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: translate(0,0); box-shadow: none; }

components.name: Product Card
components.description: Product grid card. Bold border, hover press shadow, tilted in grid context.
components.html:
🖨️
SIAP KIRIM

Robot Figur Articulasi

Rp 125.000
components.css: .ds-card-product { background: #fafaf9; border: 2px solid #111111; border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; transition: box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-card-product:hover { box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 #111111; } .ds-card-img { background: #eff6ff; height: 176px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 3rem; } .ds-card-body { padding: 12px; } .ds-badge { display: inline-block; background: #dbeafe; color: #1e40af; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 800; line-height: 1.2; margin: 4px 0 12px; } .ds-card-footer { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-price { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; color: #2563eb; } .ds-btn-add { background: #facc15; color: #0f0f0e; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 800; padding: 6px 10px; border-radius: 6px; border: none; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-add:hover { background: #eab308; }

components.name: Filter Pill
components.description: Category filter tab. Pill shape, uppercase label. Active = Blueprint Blue fill.
components.css: .ds-pill { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 2px solid #111111; background: #fafaf9; color: #0f0f0e; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms, color 120ms; } .ds-pill:hover { background: #eff6ff; } .ds-pill--active { background: #2563eb; color: #fafaf9; border-color: #2563eb; }

components.name: Navigation
components.description: Sticky top navbar. Blueprint Blue background. Logo + links + cart.
components.html:
Horizon3D!
ProdukCustom Order
components.css: .ds-nav { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 50; background: #2563eb; border-bottom: 3px solid #1d4ed8; padding: 0 16px; height: 56px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-nav-logo { font-family: 'Bricolage Grotesque', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 800; font-style: italic; color: #fafaf9; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-accent { color: #facc15; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 24px; } .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; color: rgba(250,250,249,0.75); text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #fafaf9; } .ds-btn-cart { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: #facc15; color: #0f0f0e; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 800; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 8px; border: 2px solid #111111; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-cart:hover { transform: translate(-2px,-2px); box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 #111111; }

components.name: Horizon Rule
components.description: Brand gradient divider. The only permitted gradient in the system.
components.css: .ds-horizon-rule { height: 3px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #2563eb 0%, #3b82f6 60%, #facc15 100%); border: none; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview:
The horizon is where the physical and the imagined meet — exactly what 3D printing does. Horizon 3D Print's visual system lives at that line. It never collapses to a pure toy brand (too chaotic) or a pure precision tool (too cold). Every page holds both: the serious rigour of a craftsperson and the genuine delight of playing with something you made.

The density is moderate. Negative space earns its keep. Products get room to breathe, photographed with confidence, not stacked like a marketplace. The grid feels alive but not frantic. There are moments of playfulness — a tilted card, a chunky shadow — but they're earned, not defaulted to.

Typography leads hard. Bricolage Grotesque carries the personality: bold, wide, slightly odd in the best way. Plus Jakarta Sans handles everything else cleanly. JetBrains Mono makes prices feel like specs — precise, trustworthy, not decorative.
keyCharacteristics: Flat-by-default surfaces that lift on interaction (no ambient shadows; only structural)
2px solid #111111 borders on cards — the 'press' aesthetic, tactile and direct
Blueprint Blue (#2563eb) as the dominant brand color; Filament Yellow (#facc15) as a rare, precise accent
Tilted cards in product grids only — not a global pattern
JetBrains Mono for all prices and numeric values
Bricolage Grotesque at 800 weight for all headings

rules.name: The Filament Rule
rules.body: Yellow (#facc15) appears on maximum two elements per page. Cart button and logo mark. That's the budget.

rules.name: The Horizon Gradient Rule
rules.body: The only permitted gradient is the horizon-rule divider. No gradient text. No gradient backgrounds. No gradient buttons.

rules.name: The Heading Monopoly Rule
rules.body: Bricolage Grotesque is for headings only. Never use it for body copy, labels, or button text.

rules.name: The Price Precision Rule
rules.body: All prices use JetBrains Mono. Format: Rp 125.000. Never approximate or estimate.

rules.name: The Print Press Rule
rules.body: Shadows appear only as a response to interaction, in one form: 4px 4px 0 #111111. No ambient shadows. No blur. The border does the work.

dos: Do use Bricolage Grotesque at 800 weight for all headings.
Do use 2px solid #111111 borders on all product cards.
Do use JetBrains Mono for all prices. Format: Rp 125.000.
Do tilt cards in grids: alternating rotate(-1deg) / rotate(0.8deg). Only in grids.
Do use the press shadow (4px 4px 0 #111) for hover states exclusively.
Do use Blueprint Wash (#eff6ff) as the hero and image placeholder background.
Do keep Filament Yellow on at most two elements per page.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion: disable tilt and transitions.
donts: Don't make this look like Tokopedia or Shopee: no badge storms, no orange-and-white grid.
Don't design like a SaaS dashboard: no feature-card grids, no '3 key features' layout.
Don't use cheap dropship patterns: no LIMITED TIME OFFER banners, no fake countdown timers.
Don't produce a Squarespace template: no centered-everything layout with a thin sans font.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Prohibited.
Don't add a side-stripe border (border-left > 1px as a colored accent).
Don't tilt a card outside of a product grid.
Don't use Filament Yellow as a large surface background.
Don't use #000 or #fff. Use #0f0f0e (Ink) and #fafaf9 (Cloud White).
Don't add ambient shadows at rest. The border does the work.
